suite.name: M4 Account Details

kw.name: Run Keywords
Open Higala App
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Application
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Start Screen Recording
kw.doc: Starts an asynchronous Screen Recording for the current open application.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Navigate To Login Page
Run
kw.msg: Running command 'adb -s emulator-5554 shell pm clear com.higala.ruralbanksanantonioitg 2>&1'.
kw.doc: _This keyword is considered deprecated. Use the [http://robotframework.org/robotframework/latest/libraries/Process.html| Process] library instead._

kw.name: Run
kw.msg: Running command 'adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.higala.ruralbanksanantonioitg 2>&1'.
kw.doc: _This keyword is considered deprecated. Use the [http://robotframework.org/robotframework/latest/libraries/Process.html| Process] library instead._

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Activate Application
kw.doc: Activates the application if it is not running or is running in the background.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
Capture Page Screenshot

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: TC_M4.1_001 - Verify That The User Can Access Bank Details From Home Screen
test.doc:
Login with a single-product account. Verify the Home screen shows: Account Number, Available Balance, and 3 recent transactions. Tap "Hide my balance" to mask balance. Tap "View Account Details" and verify Account Details + Interest Configuration sections. Verify "Switch Acct" button is NOT visible (single product).
Pre-conditions: AD_VALID_EMAIL has one product and at least 3 transactions.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). Check the server log and/or the logcat output for more details Stacktrace: UnknownError: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). Check the server log and/or the logcat output for more details at UIA2Proxy.command (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/build/lib/jsonwp-proxy/proxy.js:310:19) at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:103:5) at async AndroidUiautomator2Driver.doFindElementOrEls (/Users/jocelynjavier/.appium/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-driver/build/lib/commands/find.js:24:13) at async doFind (/Users/jocelynjavier/.appium/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-driver/node_modules/appium-android-driver/build/lib/commands/find.js:24:23) at async wrappedCondFn (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/build/lib/basedriver/commands/timeout.js:97:20) at async spin (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/asyncbox/build/lib/asyncbox.js:166:24) at async waitForCondition (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/asyncbox/build/lib/asyncbox.js:184:12) at async AndroidUiautomator2Driver.implicitWaitForCondition (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/build/lib/basedriver/commands/timeout.js:99:16) at async AndroidUiautomator2Driver.findElOrEls (/Users/jocelynjavier/.appium/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-driver/node_modules/appium-android-driver/build/lib/commands/find.js:45:9) at async AndroidUiautomator2Driver.findElOrElsWithProcessing (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/build/lib/basedriver/commands/find.js:12:16) at async AndroidUiautomator2Driver.findElements (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/build/lib/basedriver/commands/find.js:30:16)

test.name: TC_M4.1_002 - Verify That The Transaction History Shows Only The Last 3 Transactions On Home Screen
test.doc:
On the Home screen, verify the Recent Transactions section displays exactly 3 transaction cards (the most recent ones). Additional transactions are only visible on the full History page.
Pre-conditions: AD_VALID_EMAIL has 3 or more transactions.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). test.name: TC_M4.1_011 - Verify Accessing Product List Via Switch Acct Button
test.doc:
Login with a multi-product account. Verify "Switch Acct" button is visible. Tap it and verify the My Accounts modal appears with all active products showing balance, account name, and account number.
Pre-conditions: AD_MULTI_EMAIL has 2+ active products.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). test.name: TC_M4.1_012 - Verify Switching To A Different Savings Product
test.doc:
From the My Accounts modal, select a different savings account. Verify the Home screen updates: account number, balance, and last 3 transactions all reflect the newly selected account. Tap "Hide my balance" and verify balance is masked for the switched account.
Pre-conditions: AD_MULTI_EMAIL has at least 2 active savings accounts.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). test.name: TC_M4.1_013 - Verify View Account Details Of A Savings Product
test.doc:
After switching to a savings account, tap "View Account Details". Verify the savings product configuration screen shows: Account Details (Product Name, Account Type, Account Number), Interest Configuration (Interest rate, type, time period, rate structure).
Pre-conditions: AD_MULTI_EMAIL is on a savings product.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). Check the server log and/or the logcat output for more details Stacktrace: UnknownError: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). test.name: TC_M4.1_018 - Verify Balance Remains Masked When Switching Accounts With Hide Balance Enabled
test.doc:
On Account A, tap "Hide my balance". Switch to Account B. Verify Account B's balance is also masked (hide state persists across switches). Tap Show balance to reveal Account B's balance.
Pre-conditions: AD_MULTI_EMAIL has 2+ active accounts.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). Check the server log and/or the logcat output for more details Stacktrace: UnknownError: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). test.name: TC_M4.1_020 - Verify System Stability During Rapid Account Switching
test.doc:
Rapidly switch between accounts 5 times in quick succession. Verify the app remains stable (no crash, no flickering), and the final selected account displays correct, synchronized data.
Pre-conditions: AD_MULTI_EMAIL has 3+ active products.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). test.name: TC_M4.2_004 - Verify That The User Can View Full Transaction Details
test.doc:
From History, tap on any transaction. Verify the Transaction Details screen shows: Amount, transaction type (Send/Receive Money), To/From name + account, Bank, Date/Time, Transaction ID, Instapay Reference Number, and Notes.
Pre-conditions: AD_VALID_EMAIL has 1+ transactions.

test.name: TC_M4.2_005 - Verify Behavior When There Are No Transactions To Show
test.doc:
Login with an account that has no transaction history. Navigate to History page. Verify the empty state message is displayed.
Pre-conditions: AD_EMPTY_EMAIL has no transactions.

test.name: TC_M4.2_008 - Verify Search Bar Is Visible And Interactive In Transaction History
test.doc:
On the History page, tap the Search bar, type any input, and verify the transaction list filters dynamically in real-time.
Pre-conditions: AD_VALID_EMAIL has 1+ transactions.

test.name: TC_M4.2_009 - Verify Search By Account Name In Transaction History
test.doc:
Enter a known account name in the search bar. Verify only transactions involving that account name are shown.
Pre-conditions: AD_VALID_EMAIL has a transaction with AD_KNOWN_NAME.

test.name: TC_M4.2_010 - Verify Search By Account Number In Transaction History
test.doc:
Enter a known masked account number (e.g., "8998") in the search bar. Verify only transactions involving that account number are shown.
Pre-conditions: AD_VALID_EMAIL has a transaction with AD_KNOWN_ACCT_NO.

test.doc:
Enter a known transaction amount in the search bar. Verify only transactions with that amount are shown.
Pre-conditions: AD_VALID_EMAIL has a transaction for AD_KNOWN_AMOUNT.

test.name: TC_M4.2_014 - Verify Clearing The Search Bar Restores Full Transaction List
test.doc:
After entering a search term and filtering the list, clear the search bar. Verify the full, unfiltered transaction list is restored.
Pre-conditions: AD_VALID_EMAIL has transactions.

test.name: TC_M4.2_023 - Verify Full Transaction History For Savings Product
test.doc:
While on the savings product (jjavier+1@nmblr.ai has 3 savings products), navigate to History. Verify all historical transactions specific to that savings product are displayed.
Pre-conditions: AD_MULTI_EMAIL (jjavier+1@nmblr.ai) is on a savings product with transactions.

test.name: TC_M4.2_025 - Verify Recent Transacted Accounts Are Visible In Send Money Flow
test.doc:
From the Home screen, tap "Send Money". Verify the recent transacted accounts associated with the selected savings product are displayed for quick reference.
Pre-conditions: AD_VALID_EMAIL has at least 1 past send money transaction.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). Check the server log and/or the logcat output for more details Stacktrace: UnknownError: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). test.name: TC_M4.2_013 - Verify Search With No Matching Results In Transaction History
test.doc:
Enter a random string that matches no transactions. Verify the transaction list becomes empty and a "No transactions available" message appears.
Pre-conditions: AD_VALID_EMAIL is on the History screen.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). test.name: TC_M4.2_026 - Verify System Blocks Self-Transfer In Send Money Flow
test.doc:
In the Send Money flow, enter the user's own savings account number as the recipient. Verify the system displays: "You cannot send money to yourself." and blocks the transaction.
Pre-conditions: AD_VALID_EMAIL is logged in. Sender's account number is known.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Sanitize Filename
kw.msg: Variable '${TEST NAME}' not found. Did you mean: ${PREV_TEST_NAME}
kw.doc: Replace characters not safe for filenames with underscores.
kw.status: Variable '${TEST NAME}' not found. Did you mean: ${PREV_TEST_NAME}

kw.msg: ${r} = ('FAIL', "Variable '${TEST NAME}' not found. Did you mean:\n ${PREV_TEST_NAME}")
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Stop Screen Recording
kw.doc: Gathers the output from the previously started screen recording to a media file, then embeds it to the log.html(Android Only).
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.
